meaning: n.[天](半人马座)比邻星(亦作 Proxima Centauri)
examples: An international team of scientists found the planet moving around the star called "Proxima Centauri".
The nearest star to our own is Proxima Centuari and it lays just over 4 light-years away.
The nearest star, Proxima Centauri, has a planet orbiting it not much bigger than Earth.
In the device arena, Drant also backed Proxima Therapeutics , which markets a tiny implantable radiation treatment for breast cancer.
